inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 consolidated net income $872.7M ÷ 51.087M shares = $17.08/sh; Adjusted EBITDA $1536.2M consolidated
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses filing net income allocated by segment Adjusted EBITDA share; Adjusted EBITDA excludes realized investment gains and unusual items per 10-K definition

bear.notes: Mobile attach slows, housing catastrophes rise, investment yields fall; multiple compresses to ~10× normalized owner cash

base.notes: Connected Living mobile growth and lender-placed housing persist; 12× exit on year-10 owner cash

bull.notes: Global mobile programs scale, housing cat-light years continue, buybacks reduce share count

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Investment portfolio marked to fair value; goodwill from acquisitions; book ~$115/sh is cross-check not dhando floor (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Operating specialty insurer / warranty administrator; no land or royalty reserves

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Corporate and Other Adjusted EBITDA loss $(123.8)M FY2025 embedded in consolidated path (10-K MD&A)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Unearned premium reserve $20.9B and B2B2C partner contracts embedded in premium growth assumptions

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Home warranty business and equity securities without readily determinable fair value per 10-K footnotes

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Earnings from recurring premiums and fees, not litigation recovery

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Connected Living mobile device solutions already in Global Lifestyle revenues $9.58B FY2025

growth_explanation.mechanism: B2B2C distribution through carrier and lender partners; Connected Living mobile attach rates and financial-services cross-sell; lender-placed housing growth from policies in-force and average premium; investment float earns on $8.6B marked fixed-income portfolio.
growth_explanation.source: AIZ/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260219_rpt20251231_acc0001267238_26_000010.htm segment Adjusted EBITDA and net earned premiums tables
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Global Housing reportable catastrophes exceed $100M pre-tax for two consecutive years with no offsetting Lifestyle growth
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: Connected Living net earned premiums grow faster than 10% for four consecutive quarters while consolidated Adjusted EBITDA margin expands

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Five additive components map Global Lifestyle, Global Housing, investment float surplus, net financial claims, and catastrophe cycle reserve once each.

components.label: Global Lifestyle owner-cash engine (Connected Living + Automotive)

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from FY2025 10-K: net income $872.7M ($17.08/sh), consolidated Adjusted EBITDA $1536.2M, book ~$114.93/sh, net investment income $527.3M, net debt ~$372.8M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

source.locator: Global Lifestyle Adjusted EBITDA $801.3M; net earned premiums $9.58B FY2025
Consolidated net income $872.7M FY2025; diluted EPS $17.08/sh
WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding 51.087M FY2025

assumptions.label: Normalized net income allocated to Global Lifestyle
assumptions.rationale: Lifestyle ~48% of segment EBITDA; Connected Living mobile and financial services drive growth.

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5 on segment owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Connected Living mobile programs and lender-placed housing growth.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7 on segment owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Fade as mobile attach rates mature and housing policies normalize.

assumptions.label: Required return on segment owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Specialty insurance, catastrophe, and partner concentration risk premium.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Specialty insurer / warranty administrator peer multiples on normalized owner cash.

assumptions.label: Component schedule reconciliation factor
assumptions.rationale: Preserves additive component schedule while filing facts anchor owner-cash bridge.

assumptions.label: Catastrophe, lender-placed housing cycle, and mobile partner concentration stress reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for reportable catastrophes, housing credit cycle, and Connected Living partner concentration; not full unearned premium double-count.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of AIZ, including Global Lifestyle and Global Housing owner-cash engines, investment float surplus, net financial claims, and catastrophe cycle reserve.
economic_claim.unit_source: FY2025 weighted average diluted shares 51.087M per AIZ/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260219_rpt20251231_acc0001267238_26_000010.htm.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating segments valued through owner-cash discount paths on net income allocated by Adjusted EBITDA share; float surplus and stress reserve are separate overlap keys.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K: book value per share ~$114.93; net income $872.7M; economic value in normalized underwriting, fees, and investment spread, not book floor alone.

component_groups.label: Global Lifestyle owner-cash engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Connected Living mobile programs, Global Automotive vehicle protection
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on Lifestyle share of net income.
component_groups.adjustments: Adjusted EBITDA $801.3M FY2025; 53% of Lifestyle revenue from mobile device solutions.

component_groups.label: Global Housing owner-cash engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Lender-placed homeowners, manufactured housing, flood, renters insurance
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on Housing share of net income.

component_groups.label: Investment float and portfolio surplus
component_groups.economic_claim: Marked investment portfolio and premium float economics above segment DCF
component_groups.valuation_basis: Net asset value on surplus investment income and equity cushion.
component_groups.adjustments: Net investment income $527.3M; debt to total capital 27.3%.

component_groups.label: Catastrophe and cycle stress reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Housing catastrophes, lender-placed cycle, mobile partner concentration
component_groups.valuation_basis: Bounded negative reserve; not full unearned premium subtraction.
component_groups.adjustments: Reportable catastrophes and housing credit cycle remain widest judgment band.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Global Lifestyle owner-cash engine (Connected Living + Automotive)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
